title: Sous-vegan Curry with Sichuan
description: A tangy and creamy British meal-prep dish featuring szechuan peppercorns prepared through sous-vide cooking to achieve a low-calorie-friendly option.
instructions: Add coconut milk to a pot and heat on medium until warm. Gradually add the almond milk while stirring continuously.
In a separate bowl, mix together rice vinegar, tamari, Sichuan peppercorns, vegetable stock concentrate, ginger, green onions, and palm sugar (if using). Stir well to combine.
Once the coconut mixture is warm, add the spice blend. Bring it to a simmer and cook for about 5 minutes until thickened slightly. Remove from heat.

Pour the curry into serving dishes or containers for meal prep. Refrigerate overnight before reheating in the oven at 325°F (160°C) for about 15-20 minutes, depending on your container size and thickness.
